# Capital Consulting

> Engineers at heart. We build brands, run paid campaigns, and drive measurable growth — no fluff, just execution.

Capital Consulting is a marketing and brand-building firm based in Ottawa, ON, serving clients nationwide across Canada. Founded by ex-FANG engineers, we apply engineering rigour to brand strategy, design, SEO, and paid media.

## Services

- **Strategy** — Brand positioning, messaging architecture, competitive analysis, go-to-market strategy
- **Design** — Logo design, brand identity systems, visual language
- **SEO** — Technical SEO, on-page optimization, content strategy, local SEO (Ottawa & Toronto)
- **Paid Media** — Google Ads, Meta Ads, programmatic display, performance campaigns
- **Content Marketing** — Blog, thought leadership, content calendars
